SEARCH
Package com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators

Class ConditionalReferendumEvaluator

java.lang.Object
com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>
com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.ConditionalReferendumEvaluator
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>
@Component public class ConditionalReferendumEvaluator extends AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>
An evaluator implementation for conditional referendums Evaluates the outcome of a conditional referendum based on collected referendum forms

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator

    AbstractReferendumEvaluator.InternalResult

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected boolean
    isSuccessful(ConditionalReferendum referendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>.InternalResult result)
    Checks whether the conditional referendum is successful based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered successful if the success ratio of the referendum exceeds the pass threshold specified for the referendum
    protected boolean
    isValid(ConditionalReferendum referendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>.InternalResult result)
    Checks whether the conditional referendum is valid based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered valid if the total number of voters meets the minimal participation threshold, the ratio of local voters in the total participation exceeds the local vote quota

    Methods inherited from class com.oop.referendumserver.services.evaluators.AbstractReferendumEvaluator

    evaluate, getVoteWeight

  • Constructor Details

    • ConditionalReferendumEvaluator

      public ConditionalReferendumEvaluator()

  • Method Details

    • isValid

      protected boolean isValid(ConditionalReferendum referendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>.InternalResult result)
      Checks whether the conditional referendum is valid based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered valid if the total number of voters meets the minimal participation threshold, the ratio of local voters in the total participation exceeds the local vote quota
      Parameters:
      referendum - The conditional referendum to be evaluated
      result - The internal result of the referendum evaluation
      Returns:
      True if the conditional referendum is valid, false otherwise

    • isSuccessful

      protected boolean isSuccessful(ConditionalReferendum referendum, AbstractReferendumEvaluator<ConditionalReferendum>.InternalResult result)
      Checks whether the conditional referendum is successful based on the internal result A conditional referendum is considered successful if the success ratio of the referendum exceeds the pass threshold specified for the referendum
      Parameters:
      referendum - The conditional referendum to be evaluated
      result - The internal result of the referendum evaluation
      Returns:
      True if the conditional referendum is successful, false otherwise
